nasb.text: All your enemies Have opened their mouths wide against you; They hiss and gnash their teeth. They say, “We have swallowed her up! Surely this is the day for which we waited; We have reached it, we have seen it.”

esv.text: All your enemies rail against you; they hiss, they gnash their teeth, they cry: “We have swallowed her! Ah, this is the day we longed for; now we have it; we see it!”

cnv.text: 你所有的仇敵都張開口攻擊你， 他們嗤笑你，又咬牙切齒，說：“我們吞滅它了！ 這真是我們期待的日子！我們等到了！親眼看見了！”

ccb.text: 敌人都幸灾乐祸地讥讽你， 他们咬牙切齿地说： “我们吞灭了她！ 这是我们期待已久的日子！ 我们终于见到这一天了！”
